ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the material (if available) */,
  "color_diffuse" TEXT /* Diffuse color of the material (RGB values) */,
  "color_specular" TEXT /* Specular color of the material (RGB values) */,
  "color_ambient" TEXT /* Ambient color of the material (RGB values) */,
  "color_emissive" TEXT /* Emissive color of the material (RGB values) */,
  "transparency" REAL /* Transparency level of the material (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "reflectivity" REAL /* Reflectivity level of the material (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "bump_map" TEXT /* Path to the bump map texture file */,
  "normal_map" TEXT /* Path to the normal map texture file */,
  "displacement_map" TEXT /* Path to the displacement map texture file */,
  "roughness" REAL /* Roughness level of the material (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "metallic" REAL /* Metallic level of the material (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "anisotropy" REAL /* Anisotropy level of the material (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "ior" REAL /* Index of refraction (IOR) of the material */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the material */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the material */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the material */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material assigned to the object */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene the object belongs to */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale factor of the object (x, y, z) */,
  "rotation" TEXT /* Rotation of the object (pitch, yaw, roll) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the object (x, y, z) */,
  "visible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the object is visible in the scene */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the object */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the object */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the object */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scene */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera used in the scene */,
  "lighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lighting configuration used in the scene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scene */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the scene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the scene */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the scene */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scene */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the scene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_lighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("lighting_id") REFERENCES lighting ("lighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenes_camera_id FOREIGN KEY ("camera_id") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cameras" (
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each camera */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the camera */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the camera (x, y, z coordinates) */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the camera (pitch, yaw, roll values) */,
  "field_of_view" REAL /* Field of view (FOV) of the camera */,
  "aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the camera */,
  "near_plane" REAL /* Near clipping plane of the camera */,
  "far_plane" REAL /* Far clipping plane of the camera */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the camera */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the camera */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the camera */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the camera */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the camera */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cameras_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cameras_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lighting" (
  "lighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lighting configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lighting configuration */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of lighting (e.g., directional, point, ambient) */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the lighting */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the lighting (RGB values) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the light source (x, y, z) for point lights */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the light source (x, y, z) for directional lights */,
  "cone_angle" REAL /* Cone angle for spotlight lights */,
  "cone_falloff" REAL /* Falloff angle for spotlight lights */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the lighting configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the lighting configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the lighting configuration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the lighting configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the lighting configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lighting_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lighting_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rendering_settings" (
  "rendering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rendering configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the rendering configuration */,
  "technique" TEXT /* Rendering technique used (e.g., raytracing, rasterization) */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the rendering (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the rendered image (width, height) */,
  "samples_per_pixel" INTEGER /* Number of samples per pixel for anti-aliasing */,
  "max_bounces" INTEGER /* Maximum number of light bounces for global illumination */,
  "denoiser" TEXT /* Denoiser used (e.g., no denoiser, OpenImageDenoise) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the rendering settings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the rendering settings */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the rendering settings */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rendering settings */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the rendering settings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rendering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rendering_settings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rendering_settings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, artist, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_materials" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material assigned to the object */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the object-material relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the relationship */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id", "material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_materials_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_materials_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scene_objects" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object in the scene */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the scene-object relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date and time of the relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date and time of the relationship */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id", "object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scene_objects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scene_objects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rendering_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rendering log */,
  "rendering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rendering configuration used */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scene that was rendered */,
  "object_count" INTEGER /* Number of objects in the scene */,
  "material_count" INTEGER /* Number of materials used in the scene */,
  "lighting_count" INTEGER /* Number of lighting configurations used in the scene */,
  "camera_used" INTEGER /* ID of the camera used for rendering */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rendering process */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rendering process */,
  "performance_data" TEXT /* Performance data (e.g., rendering time, memory usage) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Detailed performance metrics (e.g., rendering time, memory usage, CPU/GPU usage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rendering_logs_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rendering_logs_camera_used FOREIGN KEY ("camera_used") REFERENCES cameras ("camera_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rendering_logs_rendering_id FOREIGN KEY ("rendering_id") REFERENCES rendering_settings ("rendering_id")
)
